import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def get_observation(state):
    H, W = state.grid.shape[:2]
    H_f = jnp.float32(H)
    W_f = jnp.float32(W)

    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([(-1, 0), (0, 1), (1, 0), (0, -1)], dtype=jnp.int32)

    agent_y = state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    agent_x = state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    norm_ay = agent_y / (H_f - 1)
    norm_ax = agent_x / (W_f - 1)
    dir_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.direction, 4)

    # Pocket
    pocket_tile_id = state.agent.pocket[0].astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_color_id = state.agent.pocket[1].astype(jnp.float32)
    pocket_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_green_ball = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 3) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 2)).astype(jnp.float32)
    holding_blue_pyramid = ((state.agent.pocket[0] == 5) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    # One-hot encode pocket tile (0-12) and color (0-11)
    pocket_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[0], 13)  # 13
    pocket_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(state.agent.pocket[1], 12)  # 12

    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    yy_f = yy.astype(jnp.float32)
    xx_f = xx.astype(jnp.float32)

    tile_ids = state.grid[:, :, 0]
    tile_colors = state.grid[:, :, 1]

    # Blue pyramid (tile=5, color=3)
    blue_pyr_mask = (tile_ids == 5) & (tile_colors == 3)
    blue_pyr_count = jnp.sum(blue_pyr_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    blue_pyr_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * blue_pyr_mask) / jnp.maximum(blue_pyr_count, 1.0)
    blue_pyr_exists = jnp.clip(blue_pyr_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_blue_pyr_y = (blue_pyr_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_blue_pyr_x = (blue_pyr_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_blue_pyr = (jnp.abs(blue_pyr_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)
    blue_pyr_norm_y = blue_pyr_y / (H_f - 1)
    blue_pyr_norm_x = blue_pyr_x / (W_f - 1)

    # Yellow hex (tile=11, color=5)
    yel_hex_mask = (tile_ids == 11) & (tile_colors == 5)
    yel_hex_count = jnp.sum(yel_hex_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    yel_hex_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * yel_hex_mask) / jnp.maximum(yel_hex_count, 1.0)
    yel_hex_exists = jnp.clip(yel_hex_count, 0.0, 1.0)
    rel_yel_hex_y = (yel_hex_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_yel_hex_x = (yel_hex_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    dist_yel_hex = (jnp.abs(yel_hex_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(yel_hex_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)
    yel_hex_norm_y = yel_hex_y / (H_f - 1)
    yel_hex_norm_x = yel_hex_x / (W_f - 1)

    # Distance from placed ball (if placed) to yellow hex
    # When holding green ball, we want to place it adjacent to yellow hex
    # The "target" for placing is next to the hex
    # Check if any adjacent cell to hex is floor (available for placing)
    # Relative: hex to agent when holding
    dist_to_hex_when_holding = dist_yel_hex * holding_green_ball

    # Front tile
    dy_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_f = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_f, 0, H - 1)
    front_x = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_f, 0, W - 1)
    front_tile_id = tile_ids[front_y, front_x].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_tile_color = tile_colors[front_y, front_x].astype(jnp.float32)
    front_tile_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_ids[front_y, front_x], 13)   # 13
    front_color_oh = jax.nn.one_hot(tile_colors[front_y, front_x], 12)  # 12

    front_is_blue_pyr = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 5) & (tile_colors[front_y, front_x] == 3)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_floor = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 1).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_door = ((tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 8) | (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 9)).astype(jnp.float32)
    front_is_open_door = (tile_ids[front_y, front_x] == 10).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Is front cell adjacent to yellow hex?
    front_adj_hex = ((jnp.abs(front_y.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_y) +
                      jnp.abs(front_x.astype(jnp.float32) - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Is agent adjacent to yellow hex?
    agent_adj_hex = ((jnp.abs(agent_y - yel_hex_y) + jnp.abs(agent_x - yel_hex_x)) <= 1.0).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Doors - individual door positions (4-room has ~4 doors)
    # Find all closed/locked doors
    closed_door_mask = (tile_ids == 9)
    locked_door_mask = (tile_ids == 8)
    open_door_mask = (tile_ids == 10)
    all_door_mask = closed_door_mask | locked_door_mask | open_door_mask

    n_closed = jnp.sum(closed_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_locked = jnp.sum(locked_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)
    n_open = jnp.sum(open_door_mask).astype(jnp.float32)

    # Mean positions of closed doors and open doors
    cd_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * closed_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(n_closed, 1.0)
    cd_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * closed_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(n_closed, 1.0)
    od_y = jnp.sum(yy_f * open_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(n_open, 1.0)
    od_x = jnp.sum(xx_f * open_door_mask) / jnp.maximum(n_open, 1.0)

    rel_cd_y = (cd_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_cd_x = (cd_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)
    rel_od_y = (od_y - agent_y) / (H_f - 1)
    rel_od_x = (od_x - agent_x) / (W_f - 1)

    # Nearest closed door distance
    dist_closed_door = (jnp.abs(cd_y - agent_y) + jnp.abs(cd_x - agent_x)) / (H_f + W_f - 2)

    # Task phase
    phase_need_pickup = ((1.0 - holding_green_ball) * (1.0 - holding_blue_pyramid)).astype(jnp.float32)
    phase_need_place = holding_green_ball

    # Step
    step_norm = state.step_num.astype(jnp.float32) / 400.0

    # Large local view: 7x7 around agent (98 values: tile+color)
    local_tiles = []
    for dy_l in range(-3, 4):
        for dx_l in range(-3, 4):
            gy = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0].astype(jnp.int32) + dy_l, 0, H - 1)
            gx = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1].astype(jnp.int32) + dx_l, 0, W - 1)
            t = tile_ids[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 12.0
            c = tile_colors[gy, gx].astype(jnp.float32) / 11.0
            local_tiles.append(t)
            local_tiles.append(c)
    local_obs = jnp.stack(local_tiles)  # 98 elements

    # Relative direction to pyramid and hex (angle encoded)
    # Direction from agent to blue pyramid
    pyr_angle_y = jnp.sign(blue_pyr_y - agent_y)
    pyr_angle_x = jnp.sign(blue_pyr_x - agent_x)
    hex_angle_y = jnp.sign(yel_hex_y - agent_y)
    hex_angle_x = jnp.sign(yel_hex_x - agent_x)

    # Is agent in same room as blue pyramid?
    # Approximate by checking if distance is small
    same_room_pyr = (dist_blue_pyr < 0.4).astype(jnp.float32)
    same_room_hex = (dist_yel_hex < 0.4).astype(jnp.float32)

    obs = jnp.concatenate([
        # Agent position & direction (6)
        jnp.array([norm_ay, norm_ax]),
        dir_oh,

        # Pocket one-hot (25)
        pocket_tile_oh,   # 13
        pocket_color_oh,  # 12

        # Key pocket flags (3)
        jnp.array([pocket_empty, holding_green_ball, holding_blue_pyramid]),

        # Blue pyramid info (7)
        jnp.array([blue_pyr_norm_y, blue_pyr_norm_x,
                   rel_blue_pyr_y, rel_blue_pyr_x,
                   dist_blue_pyr, blue_pyr_exists,
                   same_room_pyr]),

        # Yellow hex info (7)
        jnp.array([yel_hex_norm_y, yel_hex_norm_x,
                   rel_yel_hex_y, rel_yel_hex_x,
                   dist_yel_hex, yel_hex_exists,
                   same_room_hex]),

        # Directional hints (4)
        jnp.array([pyr_angle_y, pyr_angle_x, hex_angle_y, hex_angle_x]),

        # Front tile one-hot (25)
        front_tile_oh,    # 13
        front_color_oh,   # 12

        # Front tile flags (4)
        jnp.array([front_is_blue_pyr, front_is_floor, front_adj_hex, front_is_door]),

        # Adjacency & task phase (4)
        jnp.array([agent_adj_hex, phase_need_pickup, phase_need_place, front_adj_hex * holding_green_ball]),

        # Door info (7)
        jnp.array([n_closed / 4.0, n_locked / 4.0, n_open / 4.0,
                   rel_cd_y, rel_cd_x, dist_closed_door,
                   front_is_door]),

        # Step (1)
        jnp.array([step_norm]),

        # Local view 7x7 (98)
        local_obs,
    ])

    return obs.astype(jnp.float32)
